gravity_note.title: Learn: Create Gravity mod makes The End behave like the Moon (no oxygen, low gravity) — prepare before entry

oxygen_prep.title: Research oxygen supply options for Moon/End environments (potions, helmets, or environment mods)

subtitle.text: Create: Gravity makes The End the Moon. No oxygen. Low gravity. The explosion radius triples.

description: CH.07 · THE GRAVITY WARNING
▸ Create: Gravity changes the End dimension.
It becomes the Moon.
No oxygen: you suffocate without protection.
Low gravity: jumps carry you much farther.
Explosions: blast radius triples.
The End Dragon fight is a different experience.
◈ CREATE: GRAVITY EFFECTS
└ End = Moon: no breathable air
→ You need oxygen supply on entry
└ Low gravity: movement is floaty
→ Learn the new jump arc before combat
└ Explosion radius ×3: Ghast fireballs in End?
(Ghasts don't spawn there, but End Crystal
explosions are devastating — destroy them first)
└ The Dragon fight: same mechanics, different arena
crystals explode harder, platform movement changed
◈ END ENTRY PREPARATION
└ Ch13 is the End chapter — full prep listed there
└ For Ch07 awareness: note the Gravity mod exists
└ Oxygen: Water Breathing potion does NOT help
(that's underwater — End is vacuum)
└ Slow Falling + low gravity = very high jumps
(useful for reaching the pillars)
▸ The scroll was written by the first engineer
who flew a cannon ball into The End to test it.
The blast radius was notably larger than expected.
They noted it and came home.
▶ Learn the Create: Gravity End warning [check]
▶ Research oxygen supply options [check]
◇ Ch13 (The Shattered Law) is the End chapter.
The Gravity warning is preview information.
Do not enter The End until Ch13 prep is complete.
